response.global_analysis: Strict Verification: 1. Audio phonetically matches the JSON reference for the second half of the video ('Amazing Happy Halloween Night'). 2. The first half features an intro song '蒼炎' (Souen) which is not in the JSON; transcribed using on-screen text and audio. 3. Middle segment contains dialogue which is also not in the JSON. 4. Reference JSON 'Amazing Happy Halloween Night' lyrics match the video's second half, though a few words at the end were corrected based on on-screen lyrics ('泣いちゃった' instead of '消えちゃった'). Timing is strictly tied to vocal activation.
